[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Overview
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       The `using-superpowers` skill is the central dispatcher. It acts as
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       an intelligent router, taking raw user input or internal dispatch
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       requests and mapping them to the most appropriate specialized skill
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       or agent. Its effectiveness is paramount to the seamless operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       of the SupremePower framework.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ---
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Internal Process Stages
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Skill Discovery and Loading
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Action:** At the start of a session or when first invoked,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       the skill loads available skill metadata.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Mechanism:** It scans predefined directories (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/skills/`,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/qwen_skills/`) and parses skill
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       definitions (like `SKILL.md` frontmatter or `name` fields).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Request Analysis and Intent Matching
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Action:** Receives user input or a dispatched task.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Mechanism:**
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Parses the input string to identify keywords, patterns, and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       potential commands (e.g., `/skills:`, skill names).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Compares input against skill metadata (descriptions, names,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       keywords) to gauge relevance.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Considers context from the environment (e.g., `gemini.md`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       rules, user preferences stored in memory).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Skill/Agent Selection Logic
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Action:** Determines the single best skill or agent to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       execute the request.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Mechanism:**
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   **Direct Match:** If input explicitly names a skill.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   **Pattern Matching:** Using regex or string matching
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       against skill descriptions/names.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   **Heuristic Scoring:** Assigning scores based on relevance
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       and potentially other factors.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   **Priority Rules:** Applies defined priority (e.g., process
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       skills before implementation skills) if multiple apply.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   **User Instructions:** Prioritizes explicit user commands
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       or instructions.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Skill Activation Mechanism
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Action:** Invokes the chosen skill or agent.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Mechanism:**
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Uses the `activate_skill` tool (or equivalent depending on
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       the environment) with the selected skill's name.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Passes relevant arguments or context derived from the
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       user's request.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Error Handling and Fallbacks
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Action:** Manages situations where no suitable skill is found
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       or activation fails.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Mechanism:**
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Reports an error or ambiguity to the user.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   May prompt for clarification if intent is unclear.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   Could fall back to a generalist agent or default behavior
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       if configured.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ---
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Mermaid Diagram
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ```mermaid
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       graph TD
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           A[User Input / Dispatch Request] --> B(Skill Discovery &
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       Loading);
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           B --> C{Request Analysis & Intent Matching};
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           C --> D[Keyword/Pattern Matching];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           D --> E[Contextual Relevance Check];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           E --> F{Skill/Agent Selection Logic};
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           F --> G[Apply Priority Rules];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           G --> H[Select Best Match];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           H --> I{Skill/Agent Activation};
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           I --> J[Invoke Skill via activate_skill tool];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           J --> K{Skill/Agent Execution};
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           K --> L[Task Completed / Result Returned];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           F -- No Suitable Match --> M[Error: No Skill Found];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           I -- Activation Failure --> N[Error: Skill Activation Failed];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           M --> O[Report Error/Ask Clarification];
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           N --> O;
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ```
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]

[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       # Architectural Comparison: `~/.qwen` vs. `~/.gemini` vs.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       This document provides a detailed comparison of the directory
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       structures and identified components across the source `~/.qwen`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       and `~/.gemini` environments, and the consolidated
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers` hub. The goal is to understand the
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       consolidation strategy and highlight the origins of various
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       framework elements.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]

[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Overview
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       The `~/my-supremepowers` directory represents a unified
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       environment, merging functionalities and components originally
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       housed in `~/.qwen` and `~/.gemini`. This comparison aims to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       clarify how these disparate sources contribute to the consolidated
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       framework.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ---
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Consolidation Strategy
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       The primary consolidation strategy appears to be a combination of:
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       1.  **Direct Copy/Merge:** Many directories and files from
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/.gemini` and `~/.qwen` have been directly copied or their
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       contents merged into corresponding directories in
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       2.  **Dedicated Qwen Directories:** Specific Qwen-originated
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       components (agents, skills) have been placed in dedicated
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `qwen_agents` and `qwen_skills` directories within
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers`, maintaining their distinct identity.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       3.  **Renaming/Adaptation:** Some files might have been renamed
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       (e.g., `qwen_rules_superpowers.md` suggests an adaptation of a Qwen
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       rule).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ---
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ## Detailed Component Comparison
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Agents
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/agents/`:** Contains numerous agent definitions
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       (e.g., `avatararts-organizer.md`, `revenue-optimizer.md`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/agents/`:** Contains Gemini CLI custom agents
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       (e.g., `autotag_architect.toml`, `ecosystem_intelligence.toml`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/agents/`:** Contains Gemini CLI agents
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       (e.g., `autotag_architect.toml`) and potentially a
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `code-reviewer.md`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/qwen_agents/`:** Dedicated directory for
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       Qwen agents, likely mirroring `~/.qwen/agents/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** `~/.gemini/agents/` content appears to be
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       directly copied to `~/my-supremepowers/agents/`. `~/.qwen/agents/`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       content is placed in `~/my-supremepowers/qwen_agents/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Skills
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/skills/`:** Contains Qwen-specific skills (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `superpowers-brainstorming`, `ice-tracker-integration`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/skills/`:** Contains Gemini CLI skills (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `brainstorming`, `systematic-debugging`, `tooluniverse`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/skills/`:** Contains a mix of core
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       SupremePower skills (e.g., `brainstorming`, `systematic-debugging`)
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       and Gemini CLI specialized skills (e.g., `devtu-fix-tool`,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `tooluniverse`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/qwen_skills/`:** Dedicated directory for
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       Qwen skills.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Skills from `~/.gemini/skills/` and a subset
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       of `.supremepower` core skills are in `~/my-supremepowers/skills/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       Qwen's skills are in `~/my-supremepowers/qwen_skills/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Rules
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/rules/`:** Contains rule definitions (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `cross-agent-integration.mdc`, `superpowers.mdc`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/`:** Does not show a top-level `rules/` directory
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       in the listing.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/rules/`:** Contains rule files, notably
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `superpowers.mdc`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Rules from `~/.qwen/rules/` are selectively
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       copied to `~/my-supremepowers/rules/`. A specific Qwen rule is also
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       noted as `qwen_rules_superpowers.md` at the top level of
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Scripts
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/scripts/`:** Contains utility scripts (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `qwen-backup`, `qwen-sp`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/`:** Contains `update.sh` at root, no dedicated
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `scripts/` directory.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/scripts/`:** Contains scripts like
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `qwen-backup`, `qwen-sp`, `update.sh`, `enhanced_init.sh`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Scripts from `~/.qwen/scripts/` and relevant
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       utility scripts from `~/.gemini` (like `update.sh`) are gathered
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       into `~/my-supremepowers/scripts/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Policies
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/policies/`:** Contains policy files (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `auto-saved.toml`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/`:** Does not show a top-level `policies/`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       directory.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/policies/`:** Contains `auto-saved.toml`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Policies from `~/.gemini/policies/` are
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       copied to `~/my-supremepowers/policies/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Hooks
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/hooks/`:** Contains hook scripts (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `after-tool.sh`, `session-start.sh`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/`:** Contains `hookify` directory.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `new-hooks-system` also seen.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/hooks/`:** Contains hook scripts (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `after-tool.sh`, `session-start.sh`) and potentially `hooks.json`,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `run-hook.cmd` from `.supremepower`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Hooks from `~/.gemini/hooks/` are copied to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `~/my-supremepowers/hooks/`. The structure `hooks.json` and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `run-hook.cmd` likely originate from `.supremepower` or Qwen's hook
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       systems.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       ### Core Framework Elements
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.qwen/`:** Includes various top-level files (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `settings.json`, `QWEN.md`, `README.md`, `google_accounts.json`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       Also, `commands/`, `tmp/`, `todos/`, `archive/`, `plans/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/.gemini/`:** Includes various top-level files (e.g.,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `settings.json`, `GEMINI.md`, `README.md`, `google_accounts.json`,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `oauth_creds.json`). Also, `tmp/`, `logs/`, `docs/`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **`~/my-supremepowers/`:**
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `core/`: Likely from `.supremepower` or custom integration.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `lib/`: Contains `skills-core.js`, also likely from
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `.supremepower`.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `config.json`: Central configuration.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `README.md`: Consolidated top-level README.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `docs/`: All generated documentation.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           *   `commands/`: From Qwen or Gemini.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       *   **Consolidation:** Core framework elements are a blend.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       `config.json` and `README.md` are central consolidated files.

[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        5   ## Overview
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        6
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        7 - The SupremePower framework integrates components from various
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          sources, including Gemini CLI, Qwen, and custom `.supremepower`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations, into a unified structure at
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/`. This consolidation aims to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          provide a consistent and powerful AI development and operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          environment.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        7 + The SupremePower framework integrates components from various
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          sources, including Gemini CLI, Qwen, and custom `.supremepower`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations, into a unified structure at
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/`. This consolidation aims to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          provide a consistent and powerful AI development and operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          environment. It now includes dedicated sections for
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Qwen-specific items (agents, skills, hooks, plugins) and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Gemini-specific items (agents, skills, extensions, policies,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations), alongside consolidated core components and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          workflows.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        8
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        9   The framework is organized into several key areas:
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       10
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       11 - *   **Agents:** Specialized AI components with defined
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          personas and expertise.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       12 - *   **Skills:** Modular, reusable capabilities that agents
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          leverage.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       11 + *   **Agents:** Specialized AI components (Gemini CLI, Qwen,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          custom).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       12 + *   **Skills:** Modular, reusable capabilities (Core, Gemini
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          CLI, Qwen).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       13  *   **Rules & Principles:** Governing guidelines for operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]           and integration.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       14  *   **Scripts:** Utility scripts for automation and management.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47] 
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       15   *   **Policies:** Security, operational, and behavioral
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]            constraints.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       16 - *   **Hooks:** Automation logic triggered at specific workflow
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          points.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       16 + *   **Hooks:** Automation logic triggered at specific workflow
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          points (Gemini CLI, Qwen `hookify`, `new-hooks-system`).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       17   *   **Core Framework:** Foundational components enabling
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]            orchestration and functionality.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       18 - *   **Workflows:** Documented processes for key operations
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          like feature development, debugging, and component integration.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       18 + *   **Commands:** Simplified interfaces for skill/agent
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          invocation.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       19 + *   **Tests:** Various test suites ensuring framework
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          robustness.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       20 + *   **Extensions & Plugins:** Management for Gemini CLI
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          extensions and Qwen plugins.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       21 + *   **Workflows:** Documented processes for key operations
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          (feature development, debugging, component integration, request
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          handling, skill internals).
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       22 + *   **Architectural Comparisons:** Detailed analysis of
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          component origins.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       23 + *   **Miscellaneous Top-Level Files:** Important
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations and meta-data from source environments.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]       24

[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        5   ## Overview
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        6
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        7 - The SupremePower framework integrates components from various
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          sources, including Gemini CLI, Qwen, and custom `.supremepower`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations, into a unified structure at
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/`. This consolidation aims to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          provide a consistent and powerful AI development and operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          environment. It now includes dedicated sections for
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Qwen-specific items (agents, skills, hooks, plugins) and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Gemini-specific items (agents, skills, extensions, policies,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations), alongside consolidated core components and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          workflows.
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]        7 + The SupremePower framework integrates components from various
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          sources, including Gemini CLI, Qwen, and custom `.supremepower`
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations, into a unified structure at
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          `/Users/steven/my-supremepowers/`. This consolidation aims to
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          provide a consistent and powerful AI development and operation
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          environment. It now includes dedicated sections for
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Qwen-specific items (agents, skills, hooks, plugins, debugging,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          code review, documentation, integrations, plans, projects,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          security, templates, and various top-level documents) and
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          Gemini-specific items (agents, skills, extensions, policies,
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          configurations, documentation, and foundational documents),
[04/22/2026, 18:23:47]          alongside consolidated core components and workflows.
